name: Smeet Dedhia
headline: Software Developer | ML Engineer | Data Scientist

description: Sequel2SQL: An agentic LLM + RAG framework for SQL error diagnosis, optimization & correction.
AST based targeting: Designed AST-based, segment-level parsing and transformation layers to selectively process large queries for memory efficiency and apply targeted optimization strategies.
6% improvement over baseline on the BIRD-CRITIC Benchmark for NL to SQL task performance.
Architected data pipelines on AWS (S3, Athena, Redshift) using Terraform to ingest and process org-wide digital assets (websites, PDFs, documents)
Automated compliance evaluation with WCAG 2.1 standards by integrating Adobe APIs into the pipeline to generate accessibility metrics and reports for all digital assets.
Developed a framework with Node.js, Langchain & Azure for 15+ Enterprise Apps, enabling rapid infusion of AI into enterprise workflows, resulting in 65% reduction in support tickets.
Added Spring Boot interface to expose core Java server APIs, unlocking legacy data AI.
Ensured reduction in Azure & LLM API costs by using on-prem GPUs for RAG and building an LLM inference service adaptive to demand with Kubernetes.
Reduced chat latency from 90 to 20 sec by tuning multi-threading for optimal GPU memory utilization & batching, also resulting in 4x boost in RAG throughput.
Curated domain-specific datasets & constructed evaluation benchmarks to quantify AI performance on retrieval precision, grounding accuracy, hallucination rate, task success etc.
Built NextJS ChatUI with chat streaming for LLM APIs & Server-Sent-Events to broadcast realtime agent status. Integrated UI analytics libraries to track user engagement data.
As part of the Core Architecture Team, developed WebSDK serving Fortune500 clients, enabling consistent UI for 25+ downstream apps, optimized for low latency applications in finance.
Engineered UI components like Calendar widgets, smart tables & autocomplete-search. using state management, event-driven patterns, dependency injection & migrated legacy UI from JS to TS.
Orchestrated seamless data flow between the frontend SDK and Java REST APIs, leveraging Kafka and Pub/Sub for high-throughput, event-driven messaging.
Owned feature lifecycle end-to-end with & unit testing, acceptance tests & Jenkins.

Integrated CV models with robotics stack across hardware, embedded & software layers. Improved realtime inference for YOLO model from 5 to 12 FPS by switching from python to C++, tuning model precision, and various GPU Optimizations with Triton, TensorRT, NSight, CUDA.
Performed system-level profiling to identify bottlenecks across CPU, GPU, Memory, I/O. Troubleshooted end-to-end issues across hardware, embedded & software layers.
Designed a multi-threaded processing to separate camera capture, preprocessing, inference stages for stable frame rates. Using concurrency primitives in OpenMP & MPI.

education.psst: Graduating in March'26. Looking for full-time roles from May!
The same Uni MSFT CEO Satya Nadella went to...

projects.name: ByteBeingsBot
projects.description: Modular Telegram bot with router agent that delegates natural language to pluggable specialist agents.

projects.name: PrompTree
projects.description: Chain modular context blocks on a drag-and-drop board to build prompts for ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude, eliminating the need to repeat yourself.

projects.name: TradeSight
projects.description: TradeSight is a self-hosted wealth tracker that consolidates fragmented stock portfolios across Indian brokers into a secure, local dashboard. Aiming to allow active optimization for the consolidated portfolio by tracking sector-wise risk, tax-loss harvesting alerts and benchmark historical CAGR.

projects.name: PheonixGraph
projects.description: Award-winning project at HackRx by Bajaj-Finserv, securing 1st Runner Up at the national level competition.

projects.name: Rehabify
projects.description: Healthcare-focused application that won 1st Place at both eSamudaay Hackathon and AppLab Hackathon.
